name: Hoppin'john Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Black-eyed peas, canned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients into the pan in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and press "Start".
3. You can serve this delightful cholesterol-free, high-fiber bread on New Year's Eve instead of the traditional bowl of black-eyed peas believed to bring good fortune for the year ahead.
